name: March of the Dark Brigade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>進</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>軍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Lightsworn" monster in your GY that has a Level; add it to your hand, then banish a number of cards from the top of your Deck equal to the original Level of that monster in your hand. You can only activate 1 "March of the Dark Brigade" per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Lightsworn" monster in your GY that has a Level; add it to your hand, then banish a number of cards from the top of your Deck equal to the original Level of that monster in your hand. You can only activate 1 "March of the Dark Brigade" per turn.

banished: Banishes from the top of your Deck
